name: Sole in Wine
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Fillet of sole or other White fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fillet of sole or other white fish in a glass baking dish.
2. Add mushrooms and wine to the dish.
3. Bake at 350 degrees until tender, about 30 minutes.
4. Drain the liquid into a saucepan and reduce over medium heat until the amount left is equal to the initial amount of sauterne.
5. In a cup, mix the egg yolks and cream together thoroughly.
6. Add this mixture to the saucepan, using a whisk to blend.
7. Pour over the fish and return to the oven briefly to glaze.
